criteria_results.description: MobileBottomBar renders a fixed bottom strip of exactly h-12 (48px) containing a Checkbox element wired to uiState.showStatusColors; toggling it dispatches TOGGLE_STATUS_COLORS
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx:79 defines the container with 'h-12' and 'fixed bottom-0'. Lines 83-85 show the Checkbox with checked={uiState.showStatusColors} and onCheckedChange calling uiDispatch({ type: 'TOGGLE_STATUS_COLORS' }).

criteria_results.description: The fixed 50vh constant is removed from MobileBottomBar.tsx — no h-[50vh] class remains
criteria_results.evidence: Grep/read of MobileBottomBar.tsx shows no 'h-[50vh]'. It now uses 'max-h-[38vh]' (Line 126) and 'h-[55vh]' (Line 134).

criteria_results.description: MobileAddObjectPanel.tsx exists and exports a React component accepting an onClose prop; it contains a Select element listing docState.layers and at minimum 7 icon type buttons (camera, square, circle, triangle, star, hexagon, arrow-right)
criteria_results.evidence: MobileAddObjectPanel.tsx exists. Line 24 defines onClose prop. Lines 47-58 contain the Select with docState.layers. Lines 65-84 contain the 7 required icon buttons plus Text and Image icons.

criteria_results.description: When an object is selected (uiState.selectedObjectIds.length > 0), MobileBottomBar renders an Input whose value is selectedObject.name and whose onChange dispatches UPDATE_OBJECTS
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx:95-101 renders an Input when selectedObject is present. The value is tied to localName (synced with selectedObject.name at L41), and the change triggers a debounced dispatch of UPDATE_OBJECTS (Lines 50-61).

criteria_results.description: MobileBottomBar uses two Sheet components (not a mode state machine with 'list'/'edit'/'details' string literals)
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx:125 and 133 use two separate Sheet components. No mode-based string state machine is used.

criteria_results.description: The edit Sheet contains an ObjectPhotoGallery component, enabling photo addition on mobile
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx:185 renders ObjectPhotoGallery within the second Sheet (editSheetOpen).

criteria_results.description: home.tsx mobile layout wrapper div has className including 'pb-12' when isMobile is true
criteria_results.evidence: home.tsx:29 contains <div className='... pb-12'> within the isMobile conditional branch.

criteria_results.description: MobileAddObjectPanel dispatches SET_ACTIVE_LAYER when layer is changed in the Select, before adding any object
criteria_results.evidence: MobileAddObjectPanel.tsx:47 Select onValueChange calls handleLayerChange, which dispatches SET_ACTIVE_LAYER (Line 40) immediately upon user selection.

suggestions: Consider adding a 'loading' state or feedback to the 'Full Properties' scroll action to ensure users know it's working if the sheet content is large.
